core_mechanism: projection-operator reduction of a coupled system-plus-environment into a closed evolution equation for the subsystem alone, carrying a convolution memory kernel that encodes finite correlation time (non-Markovian memory) — with a perturbative time-local (convolutionless) reformulation as a controlled expansion in the coupling strength
brief_reason: The abstract derives the reduced dynamics of a subsystem coupled to a bath by comparing memory-kernel (Nakajima-Zwanzig), time-convolutionless, and post-Markovian master equations, whose shared machinery is eliminating the environment to obtain an effective equation whose accuracy hinges on how it represents finite bath-correlation-time memory.
